headline: Fifth Third Bancorp: An Income Play With Covered Calls
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp stock is a "Hold," but investors should consider covered calls. Here's what investors need to know about FITB.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Fifth Third Bancorp, Lowers Price Target to $51
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst John Pancari   maintains Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $57 to $51.
